name: Pilafi Me Aspri Saltsa--Avgolemono
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the broth (or water) into a large pot and bring it to a boil.
2. Add the rice, and stir with a fork. Cover, and cook until the grains are separate and soft, about 15 minutes.
3. In another pot, melt the butter. Add flour and stir in well.
4. Slowly add hot broth and milk, and cook until sauce thickens, stirring constantly to prevent lumping or burning.
5. Remove from the heat. Beat egg yolks with lemon juice and add to sauce, slowly, stirring constantly.
6. Return sauce to heat, continuing to stir until thickened.
7. Remove from the heat, add butter and half the cheese.
8. Pack rice into a mold. Turn out on a platter.
9. Pour sauce over rice. Sprinkle remaining cheese over it.
10. Serve hot. Serves 10-15.
